case_title: TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS ROMERO, JOSE MANASES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $449.55 FILED BY TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, JOSE MANASES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO, JOSE MANASES $449.50 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $489.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
